---
name: New package / device proposal
about: Propose a new device integration, SDK port, or example
title: '[proposal] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What are you proposing?**

<!-- Describe the device, integration, or SDK you want to add. -->

**Which directory would this live in?**

<!-- e.g. devices/arduino/my-device/, packages/python-sdk/, examples/batch-logger/ -->

**Hardware / language involved**

<!-- e.g. Arduino Nano 33 IoT, MicroPython on RP2040, Rust -->

**What xPlant API endpoints would it use?**

<!-- e.g. POST /api/v1/sensor-readings, POST /api/v1/device-events -->

**Are you willing to contribute this yourself?**

- [ ] Yes, I plan to open a PR
- [ ] No, I'm requesting that someone else build it
- [ ] I'd like help building it

**Additional context**

<!-- Links to datasheets, prior art, related projects, etc. -->
